mapper.select: select nvl(max(issue_no), 0) + 1 from cert_issue_history where substr(issue_date_code, 1, 2) = to_char(sysdate, 'YY')
mapper.insert:
select issue_seq.nextval from dual
insert into cert_issue_history values( #{issue_seq}, #{cert_request_seq}, to_char(sysdate, 'YYMMDD'), #{issue_no}, null )
mapper.select:
select h.issue_seq, h.cert_request_seq, h.issue_date_code, h.issue_no, h.printed_at,
h.issue_date_code || '-' || lpad(h.issue_no, 3, '0') as issue_number,
cir.users_id, cir.request_reason, cir.approved_at,
u.name, d.dept_name, r.rank_name, ct.cert_type_name
from cert_issue_history h
inner join cert_issue_request cir on h.cert_request_seq = cir.cert_request_seq inner join cert_type ct on cir.cert_type_seq = ct.cert_type_seq inner join users u on cir.users_id = u.id left join departments d on u.dept_seq = d.dept_seq left join rank r on u.rank_seq = r.rank_seq
order by h.issue_date_code desc, h.issue_no desc

select * from ( select h.issue_seq, h.cert_request_seq, h.issue_date_code, h.issue_no, h.printed_at
from cert_issue_history h
inner join cert_issue_request cir on h.cert_request_seq = cir.cert_request_seq
where h.cert_request_seq = #{cert_request_seq} and cir.users_id = #{loginId} and cir.status = 'APPROVED' and h.printed_at is null
order by h.issue_seq desc ) where rownum = 1
